questions.q: What is an LLM most fundamentally?
options: A statistical next-token predictor trained on text

questions.q: What is a 'hallucination' in AI output?
options: A confident but factually wrong answer

questions.q: What does a system prompt do?
options: Sets persistent instructions/behavior for the whole conversation
Is the same as a regular user message
Giving the model a few examples of the desired input/output before the real task
To encourage step-by-step reasoning before answering, improving accuracy on complex tasks
